steps.title: Count each type of side
steps.content: There are $n$ sides with length 3 cm. The number of 8 cm sides is $5n$, and the number of 4 cm sides is $6$.

steps.title: Add the side counts
steps.content:
The polygon has 30 sides total, so the counts must add to 30:
$$n+5n+6=30$$

choiceElimination:
• Choice A — $5n+6=30$: This omits the n sides with length 3 cm from the count. It only counts the 5n sides of 8 cm and the 6 sides of 4 cm, missing the n sides themselves. ✗
  • Choice B — $6n+6=30$: Counts 5n (8 cm sides) + n (3 cm sides) + 6 (4 cm sides) = 6n + 6 = 30. All three groups are included and combined correctly. ✓
  • Choice C — $8n+3n+4n=30$: Multiplies the lengths (8, 3, 4) by n and adds them. This mixes lengths with counts and does not equal the total number of sides. ✗
  • Choice D — $8 \left(5n\right)+3n+4 \left(6\right)=30$: Multiplies lengths by counts (e.g., 8 cm × 5n sides), which gives total centimeters, not total sides. This equals 30 cm, not 30 sides. ✗
That matches Choice B — $6n+6=30$.
